AppDescription.message: Menghilangkan garis hitam dari video pada layar ultrawide (21:9, 32:9, dll) di mana saja, termasuk YouTube, Netflix, Prime Video, dll.

ImproveUs.message: Silakan beri tahu kami cara meningkatkan melalui email

Off.description: Name of the mode when the extension is disabled and doesn't apply any transformations

PrivacyPolicyText.message: Kami menghargai privasi Anda dan menghormati EU GDPR. Silakan tinjau & terima kebijakan privasi kami untuk mulai menggunakan UltraWide Video.

ReviewUs.message: Silakan berikan ulasan untuk UltraWide Video di Chrome Web Store

Stretch.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets stretched horizontally to fill the video element and remove black bars

Zoom.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets zoomed (scaled up, vertically and horizontally) to fill the video element and remove black bars
